caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, pointed wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and light-colored suspenders. In front of him is a professional microphone. The background features a wall covered in framed photographs and clothing racks with garments, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. Two logos appear on screen: a circular black and white emblem reading "PODCAST" and a red and white logo that says "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains seated, shifting his gaze from looking straight ahead to looking downward. His facial expression remains relatively neutral as he appears to be speaking or listening during a recording session.
